known_limitations: No Logic project file is read: every TRACK is a reconstruction from exported evidence, never parsed session state.
Role inference is heuristic; benchmarked at 99.3% accuracy over 6467 weighted filename instances, an in-sample vocabulary-coverage figure rather than held-out generalization (docs/evaluation.md).
Plug-in chains, sends and bus routing enter only as user channel-strip notes (ANNOTATED / MANUAL); identity, order and parameters are never observed.
Automation, mixer state, track stacks and VCA assignments are HIDDEN: printed into the stems and not recoverable from them.
Mixer channels are never observed: TRACK entities carry availability channel=UNKNOWN instead of fabricated CHANNELs.
read: Evidence-only: exported audio OBSERVED (OFFICIAL_EXPORT); track structure INFERRED (HEURISTIC, benchmarked); plugin chains, sends and buses ANNOTATED-only (MANUAL notes); automation and mixer state HIDDEN.
